title: What box set is this
wikitext:
[]: What box set is this?             Quote Post by Clover » Sat Dec 25, 2010 6:23 pm Is this VHS or laserdisc? What is the title? Anyone here own it? Compiling all data. [s]Alternate angle.[/s] WHICHAW. Another box set that I have no clue about. Any documentation on this object's existence?

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Sat Dec 25, 2010 11:22 pm Some context on the images would be nice... That appears to be the Genesis 0:0 VHS tape on the far left, so presumably the trio you're interested in are a Japanese VHS release?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Dec 25, 2010 11:41 pm It's approximate size would suggest that it's a set of 6 VHS tapes. And given that the one photo is with a Japanese VHS, perhaps it's Japanese? I've seen this set at some point in the past, but I know nothing of it, simply that it is most certainly not a North American release, which is a given.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Dec 26, 2010 12:02 am It's this thing: http://store.shopping.yahoo.co.jp/ntvshop/5211i014.html It's an NTV limited edition DVD box set. More info here: http://www.furuanimepanikku.com/2008/06/25/this-has-got-to-be-the-most-stylish-evangelion-boxset-ever/

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Sun Dec 26, 2010 6:59 am It's a nice-looking box, but it doesn't have any content that's unique to it. Here's a precise breakdown of the contents: KIBA-1000 [Test Type Disc w/ Episode 1 and long-form Opening and Ending videos by Masayuki] KIBA-1001~8 [TV Episodes 1-26, including OA and NPC versions of 21-24] KIBA-1009/10 [Death(True)² and EoE with Dolby 5.1 audio] All discs previously mentioned can be easily obtained via Japanese retailers or the used market.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Dec 26, 2010 9:11 am I almost bought that DVD boxset back in the day when I was importing a lot of shit, but medical school costs got the better of me so it didn't happen.

[]: Re: What box set is this?             Quote Post by svenge » Tue Jan 04, 2011 10:45 pm Clover wrote: Is this VHS or laserdisc? What is the title? Anyone here own it? Compiling all data.
